support_email.description: Support email displayed on the OAuth consent screen. Can be a user or group email. If a user email is specified, the caller must be that user. If a group email is specified, the caller can be a user or a service account that owns the group in Cloud Identity.
support_email.rationale: A corporate mailbox helps users reach the right owner and prevents phishing/confusion from public/vendor addresses.

application_title.description: Application name shown on the OAuth consent screen.
application_title.rationale: A clear, production-ready title sets correct user expectations and avoids confusing/generic test labels.

project.description: If not provided, the provider project is used.
project.rationale: Ensures the brand is created in the intended project; mismatches can impact the wrong consent screen.
